raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1311 directs the Legislative Analyst’s Office to evaluate programs in allied health, including nursing programs offered jointly between California colleges.",
    "The bill aims to support a growing healthcare workforce to better serve California regions with significant healthcare needs.",
    "Many regions in the Central Valley have difficulty retaining a sufficient number of healthcare professionals to meet their population's needs.",
    "Madera Community Hospital closed due to the facility’s inability to hire and retain trained medical staff.",
    "A UCSF health workforce assessment found that the San Joaquin Valley has the lowest number of licensed medical professionals per capita compared to any other region in California.",
    "The San Joaquin Valley is one of the fastest growing, poorest, and least healthy regions of California.",
    "Investigating existing allied health programs at California colleges can help improve health outcomes for all Californians."
  ]
}
```
